name: ExtensionAuditEvent_Code
title: R5: Specific type of event additional types
description: R5: `AuditEvent.code` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (text)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `AuditEvent.code` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`AuditEvent.code` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `AuditEvent.code` 1..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `AuditEvent.subtype` 0..* `Coding`
*  R4: `AuditEvent.subtype` 0..* `Coding`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `AuditEvent.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `AuditEvent.subtype` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `AuditEvent.code` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `AuditEvent.code` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: text.
